assertions.assertion: Configures both AddJwtBearer and AddOAuth2Introspection handlers
assertions.rationale: Both AddJwtBearer('token') and AddOAuth2Introspection('introspection') are configured.

assertions.assertion: Uses ForwardReferenceToken (via Selector.ForwardReferenceToken) to route reference tokens to the introspection handler
The scheme name passed to ForwardReferenceToken matches the scheme name used in AddOAuth2Introspection
assertions.rationale: Both use 'introspection' as the scheme name.

assertions.assertion: Sets ValidTypes to include 'at+jwt' on the JWT bearer handler
assertions.rationale: ValidTypes = ["at+jwt"] is set on the JWT bearer handler.
Package is explicitly mentioned with dotnet add command and using directive.
